data.content_ref: inline:{"tour":["0","7","1","3","5","6","9","13","12","11","8","4","10","2"],"rationale":"Route proceeds east to city 7, then northwest to 1 and 3, southwest to 5, north to 6 and 9, east to 13, west to 12 and 11, southeast to 8, northeast to 4 and 10, and northeast to 2, forming a broad circuit."}
